archetypes.name: homepage
archetypes.description: Main landing page with hero section, value propositions, before/after gallery, treatment areas tabs (male/female), and clinic finder CTA

archetypes.name: treatment
archetypes.description: Treatment-specific pages following a consistent pattern: hero with large image, feature highlights (3 cards), before/after comparison, product carousel with JUVÉDERM product details, FAQ accordion, treatment areas tabs, clinic finder CTA

archetypes.name: faq
archetypes.description: FAQ page with topic-based navigation, multiple Q&A sections each with heading, explanatory text, images, and key takeaway summaries

archetypes.name: find-a-clinic
archetypes.description: Clinic finder page with location-based search input, city quick-links (Amsterdam, Rotterdam, Den Haag, Utrecht), and image

archetypes.name: legal
archetypes.description: Simple text-heavy pages for legal/compliance content: contact info, disclaimers, terms and conditions. Minimal layout, mostly default content.

assets.disclaimer: Kijk uit. Jezelf mooier maken kan lelijk uitpakken. Een geslaagde ingreep begint bij een goede arts.
